notes: Declarative house-style ruleset for `restyle`. Each family maps a set of EXACT Tailwind class tokens to a single token-driven replacement. Members are literal classes, never prefix globs — so directional/arbitrary variants (rounded-t-lg, rounded-tl-sm, rounded-[2px]) and semantic shapes (rounded-full) are NEVER matched and therefore preserved.
radius/shadow: rounded-full, rounded-none, shadow-none, shadow-inner are intentionally NOT members.

border: the bare `border` width utility maps to `border-ui` ONLY on the files in families.border.scope.only. border-ui is Card-only per docs/README-SHAPE-TOKENS.md (--ui-border-width defaults to 0); every other primitive keeps literal border / border-2 / border-transparent / border-b. border-2, border-input, border-transparent, border-b/-t are NOT members.

imports.relativizeAliases is the storefront-ui canonical convention (ESLint there forbids @/ imports under src/components/ui). Customers who keep the shadcn @/ convention set relativizeAliases: [] in ruleset.customer.json — relative imports still resolve correctly either way.
